                      356.Astarion: This is no ordinary mind flayer parasite. Who tampered with it and why? What do they have planned for us?

                      Metadata

                      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 9db07819-608b-0747-ab4d-c7777aca746cSpeaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: hf5eb7f66g20c6g4013ga25ag3ce2096668aaText UUID: f051eed8-6d04-4150-adb2-4fa47d4623e4Timeline Phase Index: 341Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 9db07819-608b-0747-ab4d-c7777aca746cTimeline Phase Duration: 18.2sTimeline Phase Shots: 4Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [2595.57s-2599.12s] | @ 2595.57s | speaker 0 | Fear (16) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [2595.57s-2599.12s] | @ 2598.97s | speaker 0 | Fear (16)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 2 [2599.12s-2603.34s] | @ 2599.94s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 2 [2599.12s-2603.34s] | @ 2601.67s | speaker 0 | Fear (16)Timeline Emotion 5: Shot 3 [2603.34s-2607.73s] | @ 2603.34s | speaker 0 | Fear (16) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 6: Shot 3 [2603.34s-2607.73s] | @ 2605.38s | speaker 0 | Fear (16) | variation 2Group ID: 9db07819-608b-0747-ab4d-c7777aca746cGroup Index: 0
                      • •
                        197.Astarion: And why are we important enough that a devil comes knocking on our door? If we find those answers, we might have a chance. [End]

                        Metadata

                      283.Astarion: You know who tampered with the parasite. And why. And what they have planned for us.

                      Metadata

                      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 7abe9deb-3c60-7d34-dac1-29f5c29c8bc5Speaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: hc0906738g885bg4382g9cbagc31a02aa9d7aText UUID: 9c22d701-241b-44fe-bd3b-598e69406418Timeline Phase Index: 264Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 7abe9deb-3c60-7d34-dac1-29f5c29c8bc5Timeline Phase Duration: 4.24sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [2050.83s-2053.32s] | @ 2050.83s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [2050.83s-2053.32s] | @ 2052.63s | speaker 0 | Confusion (1024) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 2 [2053.32s-2055.07s] | @ 2053.44s | speaker 0 | Fear (16) | variation 1
                      • +
                        103.Astarion: And of course you know why we're interesting enough that a devil would come to proposition us. Because if you don't know that, you may as well sign over your soul now.

                        Metadata

                        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 2cc23016-08f8-2e9b-0320-d1043faa088cSpeaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: h215f13fag29b4g4785gaf57gadba100748d3Text UUID: 1a15043c-f2b8-4a3e-996f-4ca98c91bf65Timeline Phase Index: 285Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 2cc23016-08f8-2e9b-0320-d1043faa088cTimeline Phase Duration: 12.15sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [2180.88s-2191.92s] | @ 2180.88s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [2180.88s-2191.92s] | @ 2181.95s | speaker 0 | Fear (16) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [2180.88s-2191.92s] | @ 2186.47s | speaker 0 | Sad (32) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [2180.88s-2191.92s] | @ 2188.88s | speaker 0 | Fear (16) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 5: Shot 1 [2180.88s-2191.92s] | @ 2191.11s | speaker 0 | Pain (2048)Timeline Emotion 6: Shot 1 [2180.88s-2191.92s] | @ 2191.56s | speaker 1 | Surprise (64)Timeline Emotion 7: Shot 1 [2180.88s-2191.92s] | @ 2191.64s | peanut slot 2 | Surprise (64) | mimicryTimeline Emotion 8: Shot 1 [2180.88s-2191.92s] | @ 2191.87s | peanut slot 0 | Surprise (64) | mimicryTimeline Emotion 9: Shot 2 [2191.92s-2193.03s] | @ 2192.06s | peanut slot 1 | Surprise (64) | mimicry

                          239.Astarion: We may escape whatever web we're trapped in, but until we know what's going on, this Raphael has us exactly where he wants us. [End]

                        147.Astarion: And of course you know why we're interesting enough that a devil - pardon, a cambion - would proposition us. Because if you don't know that, you may as well sign over your soul now.

                        Text

                        And of course you know why we're interesting enough that a devil - pardon, a cambion - would proposition us. Because if you don't know that, you may as well sign over your soul now.

      384.Astarion: I'm fine with either, naturally. The last thing I want is to ruin these nails digging through rock.

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: acc9d297-d24f-73be-c749-b3d10b6bff27Speaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: h53e51763gb210g410dgaf70gc4ba039fc9ffText UUID: 08d3da53-219e-4a11-baf3-1988a614f971Group ID: 0aca46a1-db93-8053-e092-c0153099a8abGroup Index: 1
      • +
        236.Player: Of course - we can't leave him to die!

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 67abce69-18b8-56ff-276b-39bbc9b85507Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h10e78f89g5c88g476ag82b0g2bae92b283a8Text UUID: c296f63f-30cd-478f-ab5b-69c9dd91192fShow Once: True
        • +
          520.Astarion: Haha! That's - oh, you're serious.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: f9c41b06-b3c1-93e2-a640-a2a9bf5d80beSpeaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: he6614c6ag694fg49ceg9b25g005d6098ebfdText UUID: 91c7ae61-91c2-4ae9-9635-c31fcb99636eTimeline Phase Index: 263Timeline Dialog Node UUID: f9c41b06-b3c1-93e2-a640-a2a9bf5d80beTimeline Phase Duration: 10.24sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [2040.59s-2050.83s] | @ 2040.59s | speaker 0 | Happy (2) | variation 25Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [2040.59s-2050.83s] | @ 2041.65s | speaker 0 | Happy (2) | variation 23Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [2040.59s-2050.83s] | @ 2042.51s | speaker 0 | Fear (16) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [2040.59s-2050.83s] | @ 2043.61s | speaker 0 | Confusion (1024)Timeline Emotion 5: Shot 1 [2040.59s-2050.83s] | @ 2045.15s | speaker 0 | Fear (16) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 6: Shot 1 [2040.59s-2050.83s] | @ 2046.85s | speaker 0 | Confusion (1024) | variation 1Group ID: f9c41b06-b3c1-93e2-a640-a2a9bf5d80beGroup Index: 0

            118.Astarion: Well of course we can leave him, it's the easiest thing in the world. We just have to keep on walking.

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 31a4ac12-e1b3-7006-9df7-cc06b1721afbSpeaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: hbc58e2b9gaf22g4dabg8a42g57c4504c9062Text UUID: 3ceaba58-1dfc-4927-8f8e-3f7468221ceeGroup ID: f9c41b06-b3c1-93e2-a640-a2a9bf5d80beGroup Index: 1
            • +
              257.Astarion: But if you insist on being a hero, I won't get in your way. Just don't expect me to help either.

              Metadata

              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 715bb7a1-8e11-a2d1-1487-c0905800635fSpeaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: h8e6f07f2g85bbg419eg88e3ga4af4388ceb4Text UUID: 94cbec97-3ea3-4946-a26e-2c3915008a6dTimeline Phase Index: 294Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 715bb7a1-8e11-a2d1-1487-c0905800635fTimeline Phase Duration: 8.75sTimeline Phase Shots: 3Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [2247.58s-2253.1s] | @ 2247.58s | speaker 0 | Fear (16) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [2247.58s-2253.1s] | @ 2247.58s | speaker 1 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [2247.58s-2253.1s] | @ 2248.01s | peanut slot 2 | Thinking (4) | mimicryTimeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [2247.58s-2253.1s] | @ 2248.23s | peanut slot 0 | Thinking (4) | mimicryTimeline Emotion 5: Shot 1 [2247.58s-2253.1s] | @ 2248.53s | peanut slot 1 | Thinking (4) | mimicryTimeline Emotion 6: Shot 1 [2247.58s-2253.1s] | @ 2250.19s | speaker 0 | Disgust (128)Timeline Emotion 7: Shot 1 [2247.58s-2253.1s] | @ 2251.42s | speaker 0 | Confusion (1024) | variation 2Timeline Emotion 8: Shot 2 [2253.1s-2255.77s] | @ 2253.27s | speaker 0 | Confusion (1024) | variation 1

        • +
          23.Astarion: Well - hold on, I didn't say that. The parasites still have their advantages.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 0b513a76-ed75-9ce0-c9bf-1cff174f0e96Speaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: h9b34ae66ge85eg46dbg89abg2666ed7f67a1Text UUID: f7a1df0d-4971-4623-88c9-75accf4b80c7Timeline Phase Index: 252Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 0b513a76-ed75-9ce0-c9bf-1cff174f0e96Timeline Phase Duration: 9.56sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [1948.53s-1958.09s] | @ 1948.53s | speaker 0 | Fear (16) | variation 2Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [1948.53s-1958.09s] | @ 1949.65s | speaker 0 | Confusion (1024) | variation 2Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [1948.53s-1958.09s] | @ 1950.94s | speaker 0 | Fear (16)Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [1948.53s-1958.09s] | @ 1953.27s | speaker 0 | Confusion (1024) | variation 2Timeline Emotion 5: Shot 1 [1948.53s-1958.09s] | @ 1954.59s | speaker 0 | Confusion (1024) | variation 1Group ID: 0b513a76-ed75-9ce0-c9bf-1cff174f0e96Group Index: 0
          • +
            449.Astarion: And who knows, they might even have some new tricks to reveal?

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: cebbd058-78f1-d72e-e9c0-42e5276f0196Speaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: h53f03038g55c1g4ecegaaaag3ace013608d1Text UUID: 3c2f1bc1-6da8-4d76-b311-5e27f55d5d16Group ID: 0b513a76-ed75-9ce0-c9bf-1cff174f0e96Group Index: 1

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: e3375dda-5664-8ab0-52b2-d7c4ab171ebeSpeaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: ha159c4a7gc934g4d6fg98f6g26ff1d72464dText UUID: b5fabdf2-1e5f-4ed9-85cf-d91d9cb61bfaGroup ID: 785bd633-5a26-bb6b-27e0-4791cfc721f6Group Index: 2

          143.Player: I'd rather not explode, quite honestly.

          Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 3df22815-a7e6-c808-4d36-46e2c626f9cfSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h15b1aad1gc7efg41b5ga0c3g2a703b8db81fText UUID: 0e61168d-2585-4f4c-adc3-63780c60b5bdShow Once: True
          • +
            38.Astarion: Oh, thank the gods. I was sure you were actually going to do it.

      510.Astarion: I wish I could tell you dying isn't so bad, but my experience has been quite... specific. Sorry.

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: f5190fe7-af43-783d-aac3-382629e9cb49Speaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: h7ba1343dg0877g4a49g9343g39ed0bd6d54eText UUID: 34ee44cc-de4d-43df-a7d5-e057ed9c093cGroup ID: 4618921b-e8df-d351-db2d-c6771859fbc4Group Index: 1
      • +

          507.Astarion: I suppose we can spare the occasional trinket if it stops you from killing us all.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: f0e30924-e1af-507c-85dd-9cbd8bc99eb9Speaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: h6fee9dacg38e9g41c0g9581g8389c9ab54d4Text UUID: 8bab5332-db43-4fa9-ba84-71a29b3f544cGroup ID: 4397935b-944d-e84e-7810-f787003275cbGroup Index: 1

      305.Astarion: A pity, really - you could have tasted some real power. But what do I know? I'm sure Mystra's boon is lovely.Gale

      Variant 2

      Instead he bowed to the will of his god and traded it for a sad little boon. Pathetic.
      hd4d58fd2g7efcg4f22g84c4g969c0d70a926 | 2c11a0e4-e82a-4ec7-aa7c-31b9132283c6 | stub

          Metadata

            42.Astarion: She probably just needs some time for it to sink in. I'm sure she'll be elated soon. [End]

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 13b012f0-9494-2cfa-e098-8f57fdfb3c28Speaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: h76c0c7c7g798eg478ag9479g206603d3b4c1Text UUID: 36477d9b-9a7e-49d7-a214-fae1929866d0Timeline Phase Index: 347Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 13b012f0-9494-2cfa-e098-8f57fdfb3c28Timeline Phase Duration: 8.4sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [2646.72s-2655.12s] | @ 2647.61s | speaker 0 | Confusion (1024)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [2646.72s-2655.12s] | @ 2648.68s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [2646.72s-2655.12s] | @ 2650.15s | speaker 0 | Fear (16) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [2646.72s-2655.12s] | @ 2651.02s | speaker 0 | Fear (16) | variation 23Timeline Emotion 5: Shot 1 [2646.72s-2655.12s] | @ 2651.44s | speaker 0 | Fear (16)Timeline Emotion 6: Shot 1 [2646.72s-2655.12s] | @ 2652.75s | speaker 0 | Confusion (1024) | variation 2Timeline Emotion 7: Shot 1 [2646.72s-2655.12s] | @ 2653.66s | speaker 0 | Confusion (1024) | variation 24Timeline Emotion 8: Shot 1 [2646.72s-2655.12s] | @ 2654.11s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 9: Shot 1 [2655.12s-2662.52s] | @ 2655.12s | speaker 0 | Confusion (1024) | variation 23End Node: True

          71.Astarion: Not what I'd expected. There was a sense of... emptiness.

          Metadata

        h30e803c7geea0g4c2dgad26g1f10b6c66655 | 6903a3ab-80be-4dfd-9d27-9c20a20482fa | stub

        Variant 2

        Even if she's damned herself to a lifetime of that same pain.

              16.Player: We should take every advantage we can get - let's explore these powers and see where they take us.

              • +

    51.Astarion: I had another visit from that dream figure. I take it you did too? It claims that if we infiltrate the heart of the cult that's giving out these parasites, we'll find the answers we're looking for.TG_Daisy_AfterDream2!TG_Daisy_AfterDream2

      77.Astarion: It gave me another gift, too. Just like it did the first time it appeared. Rather generous, if you ask me.

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 2253dc0d-a7fa-aaa4-a9de-eb946d71a7d6Speaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: h2354d21fg6834g495ag85b3g8bf49aff687bText UUID: af3d68ea-2bbf-4c95-a909-eb8c813000aeGroup ID: 1825299b-d527-e835-2ebf-cf0ef7738027Group Index: 1
      • +
        271.Player: Seems straightforward to me. If we want to infiltrate Moonrise Towers, these tadpole gifts might be the best way to do it.GOB_DrowCommander_Event_RaidersSortie

        • See Node 503 (Astarion) Of course not, darling! You mustn't blame yourself.

        492.Player: They do look pretty good, don't they?

    300.Astarion: For what it's worth, I rather like your new look. It adds a sense of drama - a little more flair.TG_ORI_Wyll_IsDevilWyll!TG_ORI_Wyll_IsDevil
